text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>2. Bey Herrn Euler dem Buchbinder am Rheinsprung ist zu erfragen, wo folgende Bücher iraisonablem Preis zu haben seyen : <BIBL><TITLE>Janii & Tremellii Biblia cum Annotationibus</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><TITLE>Acta Eruditorum Lipsiensia</TITLE> de An. <YEAR>1738</YEAR>. & <YEAR>1739</YEAR>.</BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Mohemii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>institutiones histor. Christ.</TITLE> maiores <VOLUME>1. Seculi</VOLUME>, samtl. in <FORMAT>4t</FORMAT>.</BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Titus Livius</TITLE> ex Editione <AUTHOR>Joannis Clerici</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ovidii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Tristiam & Epistolae ex Ponto</TITLE> mit <AUTHOR>Sinceri</AUTHOR> Anmerckungen</BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Herodianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Bocceri</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Elianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Schefferi</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Schrevelii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Lexicon Graeco Latinum & Lat. Graec.</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Nisselii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Biblia Hebraea</TITLE></BIBL>; und <BIBL><AUTHOR>Buxtorfii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Lexicon</TITLE>, samtl. in <FORMAT>8v</FORMAT>.</BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":5,"explanation":"1. Fixed corrupted OCR/encoding characters: \"B√ºcher\" → \"Bücher\" (the sequence \\u221a\\u00ba represented a garbled \"ü\"). 2. Fixed \"Prei√ü\" → \"Preis\" (\\u221a\\u00fc represented a garbled \"ß/s\"). 3. Fixed the FORMAT value \"4t√≤\" → \"4t\" by removing the garbled trailing characters (\\u221a\\u2264). 4. Fixed the FORMAT value \"8v√≤\" → \"8v\" by removing the garbled trailing characters (\\u221a\\u2264). 5. Fixed a structural XML error: the BIBL element for \"Mohemii ... institutiones\" was not closed before the next BIBL began. The closing </BIBL> tag was originally misplaced after the entire Buxtorfii entry, leaving the Mohemii BIBL open. I closed the Mohemii BIBL after \"in 4t.\" so the bibliographic entries are correctly nested and separated."}

Seculi</VOLUME>, samtl. in <FORMAT>4t</FORMAT>.</BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Titus Livius</TITLE> ex Editione <AUTHOR>Joannis Clerici</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ovidii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Tristiam & Epistolae ex Ponto</TITLE> mit <AUTHOR>Sinceri</AUTHOR> Anmerckungen</BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Herodianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Bocceri</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Elianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Schefferi</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Schrevelii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Lexicon Graeco Latinum & Lat. Graec.</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Nisselii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Biblia Hebraea</TITLE></BIBL>; und <BIBL><AUTHOR>Buxtorfii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Lexicon</TITLE>, samtl. in <FORMAT>8v</FORMAT>.</BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation: 1. Fixed corrupted OCR/encoding characters: "B√ºcher" → "Bücher" (the sequence \u221a\u00ba represented a garbled "ü"). 2. Fixed "Prei√ü" → "Preis" (\u221a\u00fc represented a garbled "ß/s"). 3. Fixed the FORMAT value "4t√≤" → "4t" by removing the garbled trailing characters (\u221a\u2264). 4. Fixed the FORMAT value "8v√≤" → "8v" by removing the garbled trailing characters (\u221a\u2264). 5. Fixed a structural XML error: the BIBL element for "Mohemii ... institutiones" was not closed before the next BIBL began. The closing </BIBL> tag was originally misplaced after the entire Buxtorfii entry, leaving the Mohemii BIBL open. I closed the Mohemii BIBL after "in 4t." so the bibliographic entries are correctly nested and separated.
